archetype: Organic & Earthy with a Premium Tech Twist

design_philosophy.core_concept: Premium, warm, and rewarding AI food intelligence for hormonal conditions. Every interaction must feel dopamine-engineered, avoiding clinical or cold interfaces.
design_philosophy.key_mechanics: Anticipation, variable rewards, micro-interactions, streak building.

spacing_and_layout.container: w-full max-w-[480px] mx-auto min-h-screen bg-white relative shadow-[0_0_40px_rgba(0,0,0,0.05)] overflow-x-hidden
spacing_and_layout.navigation: fixed bottom-0 w-full max-w-[480px] bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-t border-[#E8E6FF] pb-safe pt-3 px-6 flex justify-between items-center z-50

card.base: bg-[#F8F7FF] border border-[#E8E6FF] rounded-[16px] shadow-[0_2px_12px_rgba(83,74,183,0.08)] overflow-hidden transition-all duration-300

button.primary: w-full bg-[#534AB7] text-white rounded-[12px] py-4 px-6 font-semibold flex justify-center items-center gap-2 transition-all duration-300 hover:bg-[#453D99] active:scale-[0.97]
button.secondary: w-full bg-[#F8F7FF] text-[#534AB7] rounded-[12px] py-4 px-6 font-semibold flex justify-center items-center gap-2 border border-[#E8E6FF] transition-all duration-300 hover:bg-[#E8E6FF] active:scale-[0.97]
button.ghost: w-full text-[#6B6A7C] rounded-[12px] py-4 px-6 font-medium flex justify-center items-center gap-2 transition-all duration-300 hover:bg-[#F8F7FF] hover:text-[#534AB7] active:scale-[0.97]

input.base: w-full bg-[#F8F7FF] border border-[#E8E6FF] rounded-[12px] px-4 py-4 text-[#1A1A24] focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#534AB7]/50 focus:border-[#534AB7] transition-all duration-300

score_indicator.excellent: bg-[#639922]/10 text-[#639922] font-semibold px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-sm flex items-center gap-1
score_indicator.moderate: bg-[#BA7517]/10 text-[#BA7517] font-semibold px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-sm flex items-center gap-1
score_indicator.poor: bg-[#A32D2D]/10 text-[#A32D2D] font-semibold px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-sm flex items-center gap-1

food_images.description: Vegan buddha bowl with vibrant colors

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the mobile-first max-width of 480px, centered horizontally.

Do NOT use raw HTML `<select>` or `<input type='date'>`. Use Shadcn UI components for complex logic, but aggressively override their default styles to match the rounded (`rounded-[12px]/[16px]`), soft-shadow (`0 2px 12px rgba(83,74,183,0.08)`), subtle-purple (`bg-[#F8F7FF]`) aesthetic.
Ensure `framer-motion` is imported and used extensively. Every list should stagger in. Every button must have a spring scale effect on tap.
Dopamine engineering: Use the defined 'success' green extensively when displaying positive health ratings, alongside celebratory micro-animations (e.g., icons popping in).
Implement streaks and gamification visibly using circular progress or prominent badges in the profile and home screens.
All interactive elements MUST include `data-testid` attributes.
Do not use dark backgrounds, keep the interface overwhelmingly white with #F8F7FF accents and #534AB7 focal points.
